reviews.comment:
No importa cuando leas esto.. Pésima atención de los playeros… filas interminables, ellos charlando chup..un huevo todo como si nada y encima con menos onda para atender.. la experiencia con gente así jamás puede ser buena..

(Translated by Google)
No matter when you read this... Terrible service from the beach attendants... endless lines, them chatting away like nothing was wrong, and on top of that, they weren't even friendly enough to help... an experience with people like that can never be good.

reviews.comment:
Atención excelente, me atendió Mauro es un capo el loco, sería genial que tengan más empleados así, vuelvo 100pre

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, Mauro helped me, he's a fantastic guy, it would be great if they had more employees like him, I'll be back 100/10.

nunca vi una estación tan lenta con colas de cuadras es ridículo cargar aca

I've never seen such a slow station with queues stretching for blocks; it's ridiculous to load here.

reviews.comment:
Los precios de Full, súper accesibles y variados! La atención 10 puntos, los chicos son unos genios !
Súper recomendable si andas por la zona o de pasada

(Translated by Google)
Full's prices are super affordable and varied! The service is top-notch, the guys are fantastic! Highly recommended if you're in the area or just passing through.

reviewReply.comment:
Hola Deborah, muchas gracias por tu valoración.
Tu comentario nos ayuda a seguir creciendo.

saludos

reviews.comment:
Siempre hay largas colas y las ganas de atender del playero eran increíbles,santiagueño en hora de siesta ,eran las 23 para jajajaja

(Translated by Google)
There are always long lines and the gas station attendant's eagerness to help was incredible, a man from Santiago during siesta time, it was 11 pm for him hahaha
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205UVJtVmtaR1pFYUVNdFRHNDNSazlSTWpoWFNGRRAB

reviews.comment:
Nafta. Que más que decir que un articulo tan innecesario como caro,  colas y colas que llegan hasta 1 cuadra en buenas momentos, hacen que cargar nafta siempre sea un rato scrolleando en el auto o escuchando esos programas nocturnos de radio donde la.gente sola comenta sus miserias

(Translated by Google)
Gasoline. What more can be said than that such an unnecessary and expensive item, with lines and lines that stretch for up to a block at good times, makes filling up a gas station always a time spent scrolling in the car or listening to those late-night radio programs where people just talk about their misery.

reviewReply.comment: ¡Muchas gracias por su tiempo y opinión!. Al ser una de las pocas estaciones de servicio en la zona, la gran demanda hace que la atención se vea demorada en algunas ocasiones. Tendremos en cuenta su comentario para seguir mejorando este aspecto. Saludos.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsMjlETDVRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los playeros de la tarde de las 14.40hs 24/04
Malisima la atencion, me hicieron pasar de  un lado a otro solo por que tenia un bidon.
La peor experiencia de esa sucursal o de Ypf en si.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendants at 2:40 PM on April 24th were terrible. They made me go from one place to another just because I had a jerrycan.
The worst experience I've ever had at that branch or at YPF in general.
